class.name: OTelScope
class.brief_description: Instrumentation scope identifying the library that produced a signal.
class.description: Holds the instrumentation library name, version, and optional scope attributes.

method.name: add_attribute
method.description: Adds or replaces attribute [param key] with [param value].

method.name: to_otlp_dict
method.description: Returns the scope as an OTLP-format Dictionary.
